full_text:
TLS meeting

GeoMx data analysis

Ada, Hanna, Zhihan
16.09.2025

#1 - GeoMx workflow & AOIs

Zhihan

Guided by adjacent tCycIF slide
selected regions of interest (ROIs) 
can be divided into 2 areas of illumination (AOIs)
whole transcriptome - probe based sequencing
multi cellular resolution 
~200x200μm ROI = 100-300 cells

GeoMx TLS - Sampling Procedure

GeoMx TLS - our samples and data

GeoMx TLS data
20 samples (18 remaining)
2 samples is removed due to bad quality
9 samples containing mature TLS / GC
9 samples only Aggs
274 ROIs/AOIs (selected)
220 ROIs/AOIs after QC
47 GC, 45 TB, 42 S, 86 Agg
13214 genes detected across TLS dataset
mean gene nr/AOI: 4783
mean gene detection rate/AOI: 0.25

GeoMx TLS ROIs/AOIs selection
Mature TLS: GC+TB+Stroma
Aggregates: aim for 5 AOIs per sample
All ROIs are pre selected based on tcycif staining and guided by CD20 / CD45 / PanCK on GeoMx slide when selecting

GeoMx + Proteomics

Patient-level and region-level AOI data

Heatmap for patients + regions + HR

#2 - Check annotations

Zhihan

Define signature gene sets for GC, TB, Stroma, Plasma, Agg

GC | "BCL6","CD19","MS4A1","CR2","CD22","FCER2","CD27","CR1","CD79A", "MKI67","CXCR5","PDCD1","CXCL13","RGS13","GCSAM","STMN1","TOP2A", "FDCSP","CLU","S1PR2","CD38","TNFRSF17"
TB | "IL21","CCL19","CCL21","ICOS","CD40", "CD40LG","CD3D", "CD3E", "CD3G", "CD4", "CD8A", "CD8B", "CD28","CTLA4","LAG3", "TIGIT","IL2RA","FOXP3",
"SATB1","IL2","IL6","LAMP3","TBX21","BATF","CXCL9","CXCL10",
"CCR6","CCR7"
stroma | "LTBR","TNFSF13","CXCL12","PDPN", "FAP","COL1A1","COL3A1","ACTA2",
"VEGFA","MZB1","XBP1","PRDM1","SDC1","JCHAIN","SLAMF7",
"IGHG1","IGHG2","IGHA1"
plasma | "MZB1","XBP1","PRDM1","SDC1","IGHM","CD38","IFNG","IRF4","JCHAIN",
"SLAMF7","IGHG1","IGHG2","IGHA1"
agg | "RGS1","CCL19","CCL21","CCR7","LTA","LTB","LTBR","IL6","TNFSF13",
"SATB1","CXCL12","PDPN","MS4A1","CD79A","LAMP3","CD3D", "CD3E", "CD3G", "CD4", "CD8A", "CD8B"

Define signature gene sets for GC, TB, Stroma, Plasma, Agg

Signature Score for GC, TB, Stroma

GSVA (Gene Set Variation Analysis) to get scores for each AOI in all 3 gene sets - GC, TB, Stroma
(-1, 1) and 1 = fully enriched in this gene sets
for each sample, calculate its top_score, second_score, and conf = (abs(top_score) -abs(second_score)) / abs(top_score)
conf_threshold <- 0.50, add group of intermediate
This will convert many Aggs to TB and S so I change their annotation back to Agg

PCA and UMAP plots of signature scores for both original and new labels

Signature Score for GC, TB, Stroma - PCA

Signature Score for GC, TB, Stroma - UMAP

Signature Score for GC, TB, Stroma - label changes

Signature Score only for GC - UMAP

Signature Score only for GC - UMAP

PCA based on all genes

Top genes from PCA - PC2

original

Heatmap for PCA top genes - 
new labels

Next steps for GeoMx analysis

Normalization + Remove Batch effect for only TLS AOIs
Check quality issues / re-QC / resequencing to recover more TLS AOIs data
Check those relabeled AOIs in the image and see if the new/old labels match with the morphology
ROIs alignment with tcycif cell counts
Enrichment analysis
Find and check interesting TLS related pathways, key genes / related functions inside
Deconvolution analysis - TLS cell franctions distributions
Spatial pattern recognition
Cell-cell interactions (ligand–receptor analysis)
Any ideas?

From Iga

#3 - ROIs alignment

Zhihan, Ada, Hanna

Purpose of the integration, listing main objectives

Source material, where each of the images are

Naming system for: AOIs/ROIs from GeoMx and TLS unique identifiers, CycIF images, GeoMx images, HE images

Setting a timeline, assigning tasks and agreeing on a follow-up meeting to check progress

ROIs alignment

#4 - H&E cell segmentation

Hanna
